tips.name: Pomodoro Technique
tips.description: Work 25 min, break 5 min. Repeat 4 times, then long break.

steps.title: Choose a task
steps.fullDescription: Select one specific task you want to accomplish. Write it down if needed.
steps.tip: Start with the most important task of your day.

steps.title: Set timer 25 min
steps.fullDescription: Start the timer for 25 minutes. During this time, focus only on your chosen task.
steps.tip: Put your phone away. Close unnecessary tabs.

steps.title: Take 5 min break
steps.fullDescription: Step away from your desk. Stretch your legs, drink water.

steps.title: Repeat 4 times
steps.fullDescription: After 4 Pomodoros, take a longer break of 15-30 minutes.

tips.name: No Phone Rule
tips.description: Keep phone away during work sessions

steps.title: Put phone away
steps.fullDescription: Physically place your phone in another room. Out of sight, out of mind.
steps.tip: Use an actual alarm clock instead of your phone.

steps.title: Use Focus Mode
steps.fullDescription: Enable Do Not Disturb mode on all your devices. Block distracting apps.
steps.tip: Most phones have a 'Focus Mode' feature.

steps.title: Check on breaks
steps.fullDescription: Only check your phone during scheduled breaks.
steps.tip: Set a timer for your phone check.

tips.name: One Task at a Time
tips.description: Focus on one thing. Multitasking reduces productivity.

steps.title: Write down your task
steps.fullDescription: Write down exactly what you need to accomplish. Being specific helps your brain focus.
steps.tip: Use a notebook or digital task manager.

steps.title: Block distractions
steps.fullDescription: Close all unnecessary browser tabs and apps. Keep only what you need.

steps.title: Work until timer rings
steps.fullDescription: Do not switch tasks until the timer rings.
steps.tip: Write down new tasks for later.

tips.name: Take Breaks Seriously
tips.description: Breaks help you recharge and maintain focus

steps.title: Stand up and stretch
steps.fullDescription: Stand up from your desk. Stretch your arms, legs, and back.
steps.tip: Set a timer to remind you to stand up every hour.

steps.title: Drink water
steps.fullDescription: Drink a glass of water. Dehydration causes fatigue.
steps.tip: Keep a water bottle at your desk.

steps.title: Deep breaths
steps.fullDescription: Take 5 deep breaths. Inhale slowly through your nose, exhale through your mouth.
